name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, unflagged exceptions cause delayed claim resolutions. We monitor claims and flag exceptions instead of manual review of claims.
problem_solved: delayed claim processing due to unflagged exceptions
